'''warudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focalisation|focalisation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focalisation|focalisation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| warudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæridhith|wæridhith]] || [[word:wæridhij|wæridhij]] || [[word:wæridhish|wæridhish]] || [[word:wæridhi|wæridhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:warurudhuth|warurudhuth]] || [[word:warurudhuj|warurudhuj]] || [[word:warurudhush|warurudhush]] || [[word:warurudhu|warurudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:warudhuth|warudhuth]] || [[word:warudhuj|warudhuj]] || [[word:warudhush|warudhush]] || [[word:warudhu|warudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:warufdhuth|warufdhuth]] || [[word:warufdhuj|warufdhuj]] || [[word:warufdhush|warufdhush]] || [[word:warufdhuf|warufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:warudhuthu|warudhuthu]] || [[word:warudhuju|warudhuju]] || [[word:warudhushu|warudhushu]] || [[word:warudhuku|warudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:warudhuth|warudhuth]] || [[word:warudhuj|warudhuj]] || [[word:warudhush|warudhush]] || [[word:warudhu|warudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:warudhuthul|warudhuthul]] || [[word:warudhujul|warudhujul]] || [[word:warudhushul|warudhushul]] || [[word:warudhukul|warudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:warudhuthuthu|warudhuthuthu]] || [[word:warudhujuju|warudhujuju]] || [[word:warudhushushu|warudhushushu]] || [[word:warudhuku|warudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:warudhuthun|warudhuthun]] || [[word:warudhujun|warudhujun]] || [[word:warudhushun|warudhushun]] || [[word:warudhukun|warudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:warudhuthuoro|warudhuthuoro]] || [[word:warudhujuoro|warudhujuoro]] || [[word:warudhushuoro|warudhushuoro]] || [[word:warudhukuoro|warudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
